    <p>{`IBM MQ is a queue managing service from the IBM stack. To support Kubernetes, changes to Cúram were required.`}</p>

    <p>{`When Cúram is containerized on Kubernetes, it uses IBM MQ to manage JMS messages for Cúram Deferred Processes and Cúram Workflows. For more information about MQ, see `}<a parentName="p" {...{

    <p>{`If MQ fails, certain functionality will be unusable. This includes and is not limited to, creation of a case and creation of an application. In order to reduce the likelihood
of this, MQ can be configured to be a multi-instance deployment. This results in a stateful set being created, with one active/primary queue manager, and one standby/secondary queue manager.`}</p>
    <p>{`Currently, MQ can be configured on `}<a parentName="p" {...{
